SerializableParameter.Notes: HW Configuration Vector: Level 2 0 - 0 [Active low over current enable] 1 - 1 [Comm 485] 2 - 1 [Power supply control of current sensors enable] 3 - 0 [enable DPWM mode] 4 - 0 [HW slave ID enable] 5 - 0 [Reserved] 6 - 0 [Light sensor enable] 7 - 0 [Reserved] 8 - 0 [Locked parameters] 9 - 0 [Inverted cutoff brake 1] 10 - 0 [Enable 6 Step mode] 11 - 0 [Disable field weakening safety limit] 12 - 1 [Reserved] 13 - 1 [Reserved] 14 - 0 [Current scaling x8] 15 - 0 [Reserved]
Throttle Control Mode: 2[Torque Mode With Speed Limiting]
Flux High Pass Filter Shift: 8 bits Level 2
Flux Frequency Filter Shift: 7 bits Level 2
Remote Comm Loss Braking Current Limit: 0 per unit (scale = 4096)

Communications Configuration Vector: Level 2 0 - 0 [Extended 29bit ID] 1 - 0 [CAN faults] 2 - 0 [LIN Enable] 3 - 0 [Sleep On Sync Loss] 4 - 0 [Auto Operational] 5 - 0 [Reserved] 6 - 0 [Reserved] 7 - 0 [Reserved] 8 - 0 [Reserved] 9 - 0 [Reserved] 10 - 1 [Enable Ebike] 11 - 0 [Reserved] 12 - 1 [Reserved] 13 - 0 [Reserved] 14 - 0 [Reserved] 15 - 0 [Virtual IO For Testing]
Phase Current New Gain Blue: 0 A/V (scale = 8)
Phase Current New Gain Green: 0 A/V (scale = 8)
Rated System Voltage (generally leave as-is): 48 V
Motor Over Temperature Trip Threshold: 120 deg C
Motor Foldback Starting Temperature: 100 deg C
Motor Foldback Ending Temperature: 120 deg C
Sensorless Open Loop Injection Current Ramp Time: 100 ms
Single Push Assist Boost Timer: 0 seconds
Speed Mode Positive Acceleration Ramp: 1.5 rpm/s in pu (scale = 16)
Speed Mode Regen Ramp: 1.5 rpm/s in pu (scale = 16)
Vehicle Maximum Power in PAS Mode Alternate: 1000 W
Vehicle Maximum Speed in PAS Mode Alternate: 99 km/h (scale = 256)
Maximum Throttle Speed While Pedaling: 99 km/h (scale = 256)

Motor Features: 0 - 1 [Swap motor phase Blue & Green] 1 - 1 [Fault tolerant hall (fallback to sensorless)] 2 - 1 [Bottom bracket motor (varying gear ratio)] 3 - 0 [Overload I^2t on battery not motor] 4 - 0 [Reserved] 5 - 0 [Reserved] 6 - 0 [Reserved] 7 - 0 [Reserved] 8 - 0 [Reserved] 9 - 0 [Reserved] 10 - 0 [Reserved] 11 - 0 [Reserved] 12 - 0 [Reserved] 13 - 0 [Reserved] 14 - 0 [Reserved] 15 - 0 [Reserved]

Rated Motor Power (Street mode Throttle power): 1000 W
Pedalec Sensorless Open Loop Starting Current: 0.25 pu A (scale = 4096)
Pedalec Sensorless Open Loop Freq Ramp Time ms: 300 ms
Pedalec Sensorless Closed Loop Enable Frequency: 15 Hz
High Battery State of Charge Foldback Starting Capacity: 101 % SOC
High Battery State of Charge foldback End Capacity: 102 % SOC
Alternate Speed Limit Switch Source: 5[Remote Speed]
Cold Battery Foldback Starting Temperature: 1 deg C
Cold Battery Foldback Ending Temperature: 0 deg C
Battery State of Charge Foldback Starting Capacity: 1 % SOC
Battery State of Charge Foldback End Capacity: 0 % SOC
Fast Over Voltage Fault: 59.99 V (scale = 40.96 * 100 / p[70])
Fast Under Voltage Fault: 12 V (scale = 40.96 * 100 / p[70])
Slow Over Voltage Fault: 59.99 V (scale = 40.96 * 100 / p[70])
Slow Under Voltage Fault: 12 V (scale = 40.96 * 100 / p[70])
Max Regen Phase Current: 55 A (scale = 40.96 * 100 / p[71])
Max Battery Current: 55.2 A (scale = 40.96 * 100 * p[70] / p[73])
Max Regen Battery Current: 0 A (scale = 40.96 * 100 * p[70] / p[73])

Features 2: 0 - 0 [Headlight Always ON enable] 1 - 0 [HDQ Replicating HALL] 2 - 0 [Free Wheel] 3 - 0 [Enable Plug Braking] 4 - 0 [Throttle fault into Warning] 5 - 1 [Throttle enable while rolling backward] 6 - 0 [Digital throttle fault check] 7 - 0 [Cruise enable] 8 - 0 [Hill holder enable] 9 - 0 [Invert Bit 9 of HW Config] 10 - 0 [Fixed regen in forward and reverse direction] 11 - 1 [Throttle mapping on speed for torque mode] 12 - 0 [Throttle sensitivity] 13 - 0 [Variable regen with speed] 14 - 0 [Reserved] 15 - 0 [Reserved]
Engine Braking Torque: 0 % full braking torque (scale = 40.96)
Torque Assist Multiplier: 0.53 X (scale = 1024 * 16 * 6.283 * p[72] / 15 / p[71])

Datalog Channel 3 Select: 0[Controller Output Current Rating]

Reserved Display Parameter: 0 - 0 [] 1 - 0 [Mode Switch Enable] 2 - 0 [Computer Functions Enabled] 3 - 0 [Permanent Speed Enabled] 4 - 0 [Background Light Switching Enabled] 5 - 0 [Locking Enabled] 6 - 0 [Recuperation Enabled] 7 - 0 [] 8 - 0 [] 9 - 0 [General Parameter Setting Enabled] 10 - 0 [No Assist Enabled] 11 - 0 [] 12 - 0 [] 13 - 0 [] 14 - 0 [] 15 - 0 []
Control Command Source: 4[Throttle OR Pedal Sensor]
Pedal Sensor Type: 3[Two-Wire PAS and Torque]

Features: 0 - 0 [Reserved] 1 - 0 [Enable Reverse on PAS 2] 2 - 0 [Anti theft inhibit on PAS] 3 - 0 [Low SOC Alarm - not used] 4 - 1 [Analogue Braking Enable] 5 - 0 [Motor Temperature Sensing Enable] 6 - 0 [Enable Virtual Freewheeling] 7 - 1 [Reverse Interlock Disabled] 8 - 0 [Alternate Speed Limit Enable] 9 - 0 [Rolling Start Enable] 10 - 0 [Alternate Power Limit Enable] 11 - 1 [Walk Mode Enable] 12 - 0 [Boost Mode Enable] 13 - 0 [Engine Braking Enable] 14 - 1 [Ext Fault LED on HDQ] 15 - 1 [Disable KM5 Speed Limits]
Pedalec Positive Motoring Torque Ramp: 500 ms
Pedalec Negative Motoring Torque Ramp: 500 ms
Wheel Sp. Sensor Pulses Per Rev: 0 Pulses/rev
Pedal Speed Sensor Pulses Per Revolution: 24 Pulses/rev
Pedal Sense Delay: 3 Pedal sensor pulses
Voltage Threshold for Single Speed and Temperature Source: 0.31 V (scale = 4096)
Maximum Motoring Current: 100 % of rated motor current (scale = 40.96)
Maximum Braking Current: 100 % of rated motor current (scale = 40.96)
Test Mode: 0[Closed Loop Current Mode (standard operating mode)]
Remote Speed Command: 0 % of rated RPM (scale = 40.96)
Remote Maximum Motoring Current: 0 % rated motor current (scale = 40.96)
Remote Maximum Braking Current: 0 % rated motor current (scale = 40.96)

Remote Digital Commands: 0 - 0 [Cut Out] 1 - 0 [Head Light] 2 - 0 [Run Light] 3 - 0 [Brk Light] 4 - 1 [Chrg Disable] 5 - 0 [Alt Speed Rating] 6 - 0 [Alt Power Rating] 7 - 0 [Regen 1] 8 - 0 [Regen 2] 9 - 0 [HDQ] 10 - 0 [Reserved] 11 - 0 [Reserved] 12 - 0 [Reserved] 13 - 0 [Reserved] 14 - 0 [Reserved] 15 - 0 [Reserved]
Display Speed Limit Command: 1 per unit (scale = 4096)
Display Assist Level Command: 0 per unit (scale = 4096)

Level 1 Features: Level 1 0 - 0 [Disable Field Weakening Safety Limit] 1 - 0 [Sensorless Speed in Hall Operation] 2 - 0 [Open Phase Fault Detection] 3 - 0 [Dynamic Flash] 4 - 0 [Charge Bootstrap Cap] 5 - 0 [Spare] 6 - 0 [Spare] 7 - 0 [Spare] 8 - 0 [Spare] 9 - 0 [Spare] 10 - 0 [Spare] 11 - 0 [Spare] 12 - 0 [Spare] 13 - 0 [Spare] 14 - 0 [Spare] 15 - 0 [Spare]

Features 3: 0 - 1 [Throttle bypass assist level including 0 assist] 1 - 0 [Enable Dynamic Pedalec gain] 2 - 0 [Dyname variable pedalec gain] 3 - 0 [Enable Pullup on PFS] 4 - 0 [Enable Pullup on Cruise] 5 - 0 [Throttle bypass if assist level above 0] 6 - 0 [Enable Remote Foldbacks] 7 - 1 [Ignore Low Throttle Outside Range Fault] 8 - 0 [Dynamic negative speed motoring ramp] 9 - 0 [Reserved] 10 - 0 [Cutoff disable throttle] 11 - 0 [Redundant throttle] 12 - 0 [Reserved] 13 - 0 [Reserved] 14 - 0 [Reserved] 15 - 1 [Automatically Clear Phase Over Current Faults]
Dual Speed Sensor Primary Pulse Source: 0[PFS]

Features 4: 0 - 0 [BETA: Low Speed Kp] 1 - 0 [BETA: Target Speed Ki] 2 - 0 [Throttle=Speed mode, Pedal=Torque with speed limiting] 3 - 0 [Dual Analog Throttle] 4 - 0 [Regen and Cutoff on Single Source] 5 - 0 [Invert Brake1 Digital Input] 6 - 0 [Invert Brake2 Digital Input] 7 - 0 [BMS Invert] 8 - 0 [Throttle Invert] 9 - 0 [Throttle State Machine] 10 - 0 [Input Scaling] 11 - 0 [Bidirectional Throttle] 12 - 0 [Dual Cutoff Sources] 13 - 0 [Spare] 14 - 0 [Cruise Control] 15 - 1 [Pedal Ignores Throttle Bypass]
